title: Data Centers - State of Affairs in Canada
content:
## Data Centers - State of Affairs in Canada
The data center boom has landed in Canada with a market expanding at unprecedented speed amidst a shifting landscape. We invite you to join us together with a panel of industry experts for a discussion on the key issues shaping the sector and potential solutions. Our panelists will include:
- Jason Chee-Aloy , Managing Director, Power Advisory
- Dr. Chris Ollson , Senior Environmental Health Scientist, Ollson Environmental Health Management
- Brooke Thiessen , Partner, Infrastructure M&A, Financial Advisory, Deloitte
- Fraser Roberts , CEO, Intech Risk Management
- Terri-Lee Oleniuk , Partner, McCarthy Tétrault
The panel will be moderated by:
- Ljuba Djurdjevic , Counsel, Energy Regulatory, McCarthy Tétrault
- Lynn Parsons , Partner & Co-head, Indigenous Projects & Transactions Group, McCarthy Tétrault
Following the panel discussion, we welcome you to continue the conversation with our panelists and your peers over drinks and canapes. For questions about this event, please contact torontoevents@mccarthy.ca .
This program is eligible for up to 1.5 Substantive Hours under the Law Society of Ontario’s mandatory CPD Regime.
